reviews.review_description: All the promises of all the things you can do in this game sounds amazing but the reality of it is ... You find yourself in a paddock with a horse and a character that you control.  It looks very pretty but you can't get in the barn or sit on the tractor ... there's no instructions on game play or controls and the first challenge is how to mount your horse without pissing him off .... the only bit of info you get is telling you to mount ... fantastic ... off we go then ... Hey how do we get out of the paddock then ... Frantically pressing all the buttons on the hand controls to find a jump button but hey ho .... who needs to jump when you can just realistically walk straight through the fence !  You head towards a racetrack where a man who appears to be sitting on an invisible horse awaits for you whilst your trying to walk your horse in a straight line ... Great ... as you approach the man a horse appears between his legs ... It's around this time you get a grip on the controls and end up in a horse race that makes you want to throw up at the end of it ...ok ... now what ?   the man doesn't talk ... In fact he looks like your double so must be a twin .. after an awkward silence we have another race and I win .... now what ? .... so off you go looking for something to do ... that's when you realize after trying to get back into the field ..,. that you can't and neither can you get off your horse and that's where the game came to an end .... Fantastic value for money .. how the hell can you do all the things the game promised when you can't even dismount or get back to the paddock ?  I would be very grateful to know where I'm going wrong and what's the blue triangle in front with the white arrow above it  ?  This game looked so appealing until now what a huge disappointment !

Really fun game and the riding feels immersive. The controls can be a bit tricky at times, especially when turning. It would be great if future updates added more modes like obstacle races or longer tracks.

It definitely needs work and I hope the developer continues to work on it.  The graphics are nice.  Controls are a little touchy. I found no set up menu and once on the horse there is no way to get off. At least I haven't found one.  Once I can win a race I'm hoping other options open up. As of now that's all you can do.

developer_response.body:
We truly want this experience to feel immersive, polished, and fun, and your review gives us direction on where to focus. We’re committed to improving the game, and your feedback helps shape our roadmap.

Thank you again for trying the game and for giving us critique. We hope to win you over in the next update!

reviews.review_description: If made you the person instead of controlling a character it would be much better

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback!
We really appreciate your suggestion. Making the player feel more like they are the character is definitely something we’re actively exploring, as immersion is a huge part of what makes VR special. We’ll keep working to improve that connection and make the experience feel even more personal and engaging. Thanks for playing, and stay tuned for future updates!
